speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: roye ja rahi hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn hai
text: Main subah se bas roye ja rahi hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn hai aur samajh nahi aa raha ki office kaise jaun ya kaam kaise karun. Itna bura lag raha hai ki lagta hai meri koi aukat hi nahi bachi, bas rone ka mann kar raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feeling of overwhelm and paralysis without rushing to the problem.
text: Aap subah se lagatar ro rahi hain aur andar se bilkul blank aur thama hua mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: roye ja rahi hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn hai
text: Haan, dimaag ekdum sunn hai. Ek client call thi meri, maine cancel kar di. Bas bed par baithi hoon. Itni chot lagi hai andar se ki laptop kholne ki himmat nahi ho rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and the collision with her daily work duties.
text: Itne ghanton se aap is takleef ko akele jhel rahi hain, jahan office ke kaam ka bojh bhi ab aur bhari lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: roye ja rahi hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn hai
text: Kaam ka bojh toh main roz manage karti hoon. Par kal raat pata chala ki Papa ne saari pushtaini zameen Bhai ke naam kar di. Ye sun kar hi mai aisi ho gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational shift and the shock from her father's decision.
text: Papa ke is achanak faisle ne aapko andar tak hila diya hai, jahan apne hi mayke mein achanak ek doori mehsoos hone lagi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: roye ja rahi hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn hai
text: Doori hi toh hai. Unhe lagta hai ki main divorcee beti hoon, isliye property par mera koi haq nahi hota. Main toh unke liye bas ek bojh hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue present. Keep it short, restatement only, end with a soft pause.
text: Apne hi ghar walon ne aapko sirf ek toote rishte se jod kar dekha aur aapka haq chheen liya...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: roye ja rahi hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn hai
text: Exactly! Main MNC mein kaam karti hoon, apni EMIs khud bharti hoon. Phir bhi main bas ek aisi aurat hoon jiski shaadi nahi chali. Property share se zyada mujhe unki is soch se dukh hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Two restatements done. Ask a feeling-based question regarding the invalidation of her independence.
text: Jab unhone aapki is independence aur mehnat ko andekha karke sirf status par dhyan diya, toh us pal aapke aander kya chal raha tha?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: roye ja rahi hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn hai
text: Aisa laga jaise mera wajood hi khatam ho gaya. Main itna struggle karke khadi hui hoon apni life mein, par inke samne main failure hi rahungi. Dimaag ekdum sunn hai mera sach mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her role as a self-made professional being erased by family expectations.
text: Aap itni jimmedari se akele sab kuch face kar rahi hain, par parivar ne aapki is himmat aur mehanat ko bilkul pehchana hi nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh rona hai. Maine hamesha unki expectations poori karne ki koshish ki. Par ab lagta hai ki main chahe kitna bhi kama loon, unhe kabhi fark nahi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Intensity dropped to 3. Reflect the quiet resignation of never being enough for the family.
text: Lagta hai ab andar hi andar aapne maan liya hai ki chahe aap jitni bhi koshish kar lein, yeh parivar aapko wo apnapan aur respect kabhi nahi dega jo aap deserve karti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad haan. Main prove kar karke thak chuki hoon ab. Office ke meetings mein log itni respect se baat karte hain, aur mere khud ke mayke mein meri koi value nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her worth and normalise the societal pressure of tying a woman's value to her marital status.
text: Apne hi mayke mein aisi begaangi mehsoos hona kisi ko bhi completely tod sakta hai. Hamare samaj mein aksar betiyon ke hak ko shadi ke status se tolte hain, par unki ye soch aapki corporate success aur self-worth ko bilkul define nahi karti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you, baat toh aapki sahi hai. Reality yahi hai ki main bas akeli pad gayi hoon aaj. Bhai ne bhi ek text tak nahi kiya mujhe is bare mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote of how working women are often sidelined from family property.
text: Working women ke cases mein yeh pattern bahut common hai—sirf aapke sath nahi hua, jahan financial independence ke baad family property se betiyon ko chup chap bahar kar deti hai, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj ko lagta hai aurat apna gujara khud kar legi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly this! Unhe lagta hai meri achi job hai toh mujhe kya zaroorat property ki. Par ye zameen ka nahi, ye toh belonging aur mere hisse ki respect ki baat thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her fear/implied consequence of losing her place in the family.
text: Aapko is baat ki sabse zyada takleef hai ki in paiso aur zameen ke peechhe unhone aapse aapka apnapan aur parivar ka hissa hone ka haq chheen liya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bilkul. Ab mujhe unse koi umeed nahi rakhni chahiye shayad. Par main bilkul blank hoon, rona band nahi ho raha. Ab kya karoon samajh nahi aa raha, maine toh login bhi nahi kiya hai abhi tak.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Intensity is 2 and readiness signal present. Provide 2-3 small work-related steps to manage the day.
text: Kaam aur in feelings ke beech phansna bohot exhausting hota hai. Hum do cheezein kar sakte hain—ya toh aap manager ko ek half-day ki sick leave ka text daal dijiye, ya phir bas agle ek ghante ke liye laptop band karke thoda paani pee kar rest kar lijiye. Aapko kya theek lag raha hai abhi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Mera manager kafi understanding hai, main leave apply kar deti hoon aaj ke liye. Main dhyan nahi de paungi kisi bhi meeting mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her through the leave process simply.
text: Pehle apna laptop khol kar leave ka ek simple sa text drop kar dijiye… phir system band karke thodi der aankhein band kar lijiye… bas itna hi aaj ke liye kaafi hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, message bhej diya maine. Thoda sa relief feel ho raha hai ki at least aaj calls nahi lene padenge. Par aage kaise face karungi apni family ko?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the time needed to process deep family hurt.
text: Ek hi din mein sab kuch sort karne ka pressure mat lijiye. Aise deeply ingrained family traditions jab hurt karte hain, toh mind ko us reality ko process karne mein waqt lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Waqt toh lagega sachi. Mere mind mein bar bar wahi scene ghoom raha hai jab Papa ne casually bol diya tha raat ko. Main wahi atak gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feeling of being frozen/stuck emotionally.
text: Us ek pal ka sadma abhi tak aapke zehen mein baar-baar ghoom raha hai aur aapko andar se completely freeze kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Freeze hona hi bolenge isko. Main normally itni sorted aur practical hoon, excel sheets aur deadlines akele manage karti hoon. Par aaj ekdum helpless ban gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her role as a capable professional vs her current helplessness.
text: Aap humesha sab kuch itne perfection se sambhalti hain, isliye aaj apne hi mayke ke samne khud ko aise majboor dekhna aapke liye aur bhi mushkil ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi pakda aapne. Mujhe rona bilkul pasand nahi hai aur I like being in control. Par yeh parivar ki baatein hamesha mujhe weak kar deti hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about her needs when feeling this vulnerable.
text: Jab aapke ye saare guards aise toot jate hain apno ke samne, toh us waqt sabse zyada kis tarah ke support ki zaroorat mehsoos hoti hai aapko?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas ek safe space ki. Ek aisi jagah jahan mujhe bar-bar khud ko prove na karna pade aur jahan mere divorce ki wajah se mujhe defective na samjha jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her right to a safe space and validate her corporate/life resilience.
text: Aap completely deserve karti hain ek aisi jagah jahan aapko bina kisi label ke apnaya jaye, kyunki akele khud ko khada karna aapki sabse badi strength hai, isme aapki koi kami nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Yeh sunkar sach me thoda validation mila. Mujhe ab unpe energy waste nahi karni chahiye. Main sham ko apni ek close friend se baat karungi shayad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her shift towards supportive relationships.
text: Aap ab un logon ki taraf mudna chah rahi hain jo sach mein aapki value jante hain aur aapko izzat dete hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, family se ab expectation kam hi karni padegi, bhale hi time lagega. Abhi ke liye focus sirf is baat pe hai ki aaj ka din theek se nikal jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate setting a healthy distance without using prohibited therapy words.
text: Expectations ko adjust karna ek lamba process hota hai, aur apne comfort ke hisaab se unse thoda fasla rakhna aise halaat mein bilkul sahi kadam hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Right. Main abhi thodi der aankh band karke let jati hoon, call cancel ho gaya hai toh I can rest. Thank you mujhe sunne ke liye, main sach me toot rahi thi andar se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her decision to rest and the relief after a long duration of emotional weight.
text: Aaj poori subah itni bhaari aur thaka dene wali hone ke baad, thodi der shanti se aaram karna hi sabse behtar aur zaroori kadam hai aapke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki bas ek kone mein baithi hoon
text: Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki bas ek kone mein baithi hoon, na ghar ka kaam ho raha hai na bacchon ki taraf dhyan ja raha hai. Flood of emotions itna zyada hai ki mujhe lag raha hai meri saari koshish aur meri izzat sab mitti mein mil gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the feeling of being paralyzed by the emotional flood without jumping to the stressor (Lens F).
text: Aisa mehsoos ho raha hai jaise andar ek toofan sa chal raha hai, jo itna bhaari aur takleef de raha hai ki sab kuch sunn pad gaya hai aur khud ko uthana namumkin lag raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul namumkin lag रहा hai. Aankhein dry hain par andar se flood of emotions ruk nahi raha. Bacchon ki parvarish pe focus karna meri zimmedari hai, par main ek acchi maa banne mein bhi fail ho rahi hoon kyunki dimag kaam nahi kar raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the prolonged exhaustion softly due to the stigma cue about feeling like a bad mother (Lens D).
text: Is thakan aur bhaari pan ko jhelte hue khud ko itna lamba waqt ho chuka hai ki ab yeh bojh bardaasht ke bahar jaa raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein bardasht ke bahar hai. Do din se yahi haal hai. Bhai ko business ke liye bada hissa mila aur Mummy ne kaha ki 'log kya kahenge' agar ek chhori hui aurat property maangne lage. Ek 'chhori hui aurat' ko bacchon ke liye property ka haq nahi hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the deep relational pain of being denied her rights and facing stigma from her own mother (Lens C).
text: Apni hi maa ke muh se aisi chubhne wali baatein sunna, aur apne aur bacchon ke haq ko iss tarah thukraya jana dil ko poori tarah tod deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Dil kya, meri to himmat hi toot gayi hai. Bhai ko support aur mujhe bas taane. Ye 'log kya kahenge' ka natak sun kar meri poori izzat mitti mein mil gayi lagta hai. Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki kitchen tak jaane ka man nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the feared consequence of being permanently diminished in her family's eyes (Lens E).
text: Bahar walo ki baaton ka darr aur parivar ka yeh ravaiya is baat ko lekar daba raha hai ki shayad ab hamesha ke liye tumhari pehchaan sirf ek toote rishte tak seemit reh jayegi...

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh kar diya hai in logon ne. Ek failed marriage means meri aukaat zero. I feel so much shame ki main akele apne bacchon ke liye ek secure future bhi nahi bana paa rahi hoon. Flood of emotions wapas aa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explores how she manages to survive this deep sense of devaluation as a single mother.
text: Jab apne hi ghar wale bacchon ka haq bhula kar society ki baaton ko bada mante hain, toh aise mahol mein akeli pad jaane ke baad andar ki thodi si himmat kaise bacha kar rakhti ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek kone mein baithi hoon
text: Himmat kahan bachi hai ab. Main toh bas haar chuki hoon. Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki bas ek kone mein baithi hoon aur lagta hai ab chup rehne mein hi bhalai hai. Koi fayda nahi is system se ladne ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflects the unexpressed 'quiet resignation' arising from C3 and Sequential coping dynamics.
text: Lagta hai ki is roz-roz ki kashmakash aur parivar ke bhedbhav ne tumhe andar se itna thaka diya hai ki ab tumne ek shant aur chup-chaap haar maan lene wale raaste (quiet resignation) ko chunn liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, chup ho jana hi toh chahte hain sab. Mere paas ladne ki energy bachi hi nahi. Ek chhori hui aurat ka yahi naseeb hota hai shayad humare samaaj mein. I am just too overwhelmed to even cry now.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validates her exhaustion as culturally normal and separates her worth from the societal judgment of divorce.
text: Humare yahan aksar auraton ko unki shadi ke tootne se judge kiya jata hai aur tumhara yeh poori tarah thak jana bilkul natural hai, par iska matlab yeh bilkul nahi ki bacchon ke future ke liye aawaz uthana galat hai ya tumhari apni value kam ho gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Value zero hi samajhte hain wo. Maine shadi bachane ki bhi itni koshish ki thi, sab mitti mein mil gaya. Ye flood of emotions baar baar wahi darr laata hai ki aage kya hoga bacchon ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shares a systemic anecdote about North Indian families silencing women to reduce isolation.
text: Humare North Indian parivaron mein betiyon ko haq mangne par taane milna aur unki izzat pe sawaal uthana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki samaj aur biradari ka darr sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi biradari ka darr sabse bada dushman hai mera aur bacchon ka. I feel so trapped in this house. Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki meri body bilkul heavy feel kar rahi hai. Kaise niklu is cycle se?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the physical weight of prolonged hopelessness using Lens D.
text: Itne saalo tak is darr aur dabaav ko chup-chap sehne ke baad, ab woh sara bojh ek aisi physical thakan ban gaya hai jo ek dum se tumhe aage badhne se rok raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul rok raha hai. Par bacchon ke school ka time ho raha hai aur mera yahan kone mein baitha rehna thik nahi hai. Mujhe iss overwhelmed state se bahar aana hai. Koi raasta hai kya shant hone ka abhi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offers quick, culturally appropriate grounding options to break the emotional freeze before the children arrive.
text: Iss bhaari pan ko thoda kam karne ke liye, kya tum abhi ek glass thanda pani pee kar wapas aana chahogi, ya phir bas do minute wahi baithe-baithe lambi saans lekar apne hath aur pair thode stretch karna behtar lagega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main paani pee leti hoon. (drinks water). Thoda sa theek toh laga. But the moment I think about Mummy's words, flood of emotions phir se mind me freeze kar deta hai sab kuch.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walks through a grounding exercise step by step.
text: Pehle yeh karo… apne dono paon ko zameen par flat rakho aur dhyan wahan lagao… phir ek gehri saans andar lo aur bahut dheere se chhod do… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay... (breathing). Zameen par paon rakhne se actually thoda grounded feel ho raha hai. Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki apne body ko feel karna hi bhool jati hoon aisi tension mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframes the freeze response as structural and natural rather than personal failure.
text: Aise 'log kya kahenge' wale taano ko sunkar freeze ho jana ek bilkul natural response hai tumhari body ka, yeh tumhari koi kamzori nahi balki salon ke is structural pressure aur thakan ka nateeja hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you for saying that. Mujhe lag raha tha main pagal ho rahi hoon ya just ek nakara maa hoon jo apne rights ke liye khadi bhi nahi ho sakti bina overwhelm hue.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirms her inherent strength in wanting to fight for her rights.
text: Apne hak aur bacchon ke future ke liye akele aawaz uthane ka sochna hi apne aap mein bohot badi himmat ki baat hai, khaaskar tab jab pura mahol aur khandaan khilaaf khada ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek kone mein baithi hoon
text: Himmat toh dikhani padegi bacchon ke liye. Unki padhai ka kharcha aur future meri zimmedari hai. Par aaj mere andar bilkul taqat nahi hai kisi property dispute pe dobara bahas karne ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the conflict between her duty as a mother and her deep exhaustion using Lens B.
text: Ek akele parent hone ke farz mein bacchon ka future secure karna aur andar ki is behisaab thakan ke beech mein tum ek chota sa pause lena chahti ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aaj koi bahas nahi. Main bas ab yahan se uthkar kitchen jaungi aur unka favourite snack banaungi. Unka science ka exam hai kal, I'll just sit with them to study.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asks how engaging with her children will impact her internal emotional flood.
text: Bacchon ko padhane ke bahane unke paas baith kar unka favourite khana banana, yeh chota sa kadam tumhare andar chal rahe is toofan ko aaj kitni shanti de paayega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Unko padhte dekh kar aur unke sawal answer karke dhyan shift hoga mera. Wo mera anchor hain. Unki wajah se hi toh ye flood of emotions sahan kar rahi hoon main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the calming effect of her children's presence using Lens F.
text: Unke masoom chehron ko dekh kar aur unke routine mein wapas lag kar, andar ki woh darr aur akelepan ki bechaini thodi si raahat mein badal jaati hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek kone mein baithi hoon
text: Yes. Unke bina toh mera wajood hi khatam lagta hai. I will make sure unhe meri is sad state ka asar na pade. Aaj sirf unki studies pe focus karungi aur kone mein rona band karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirms her resilience in prioritizing her children despite emotional pain.
text: Ek maa ki tarah apni khud ki takleef ko ek taraf rakh kar unki padhai ko sabse upar rakhna, yeh saaf zahir karta hai ki tum andar se kitni majboot aur suljhi hui ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Izzat mitti mein mil gayi lagti thi subah tak, but meri asli izzat toh mere bacche hain. Agar wo padh likh gaye, toh inke 'log kya kahenge' wale taane matter nahi karenge kabhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframes 'izzat' systematically, pulling it away from societal judgment and tying it to her own truth.
text: Yeh samajh lena ki tumhari izzat logo ke tano aur property se nahi balki tumhari apni mehnat aur bacchon ki parvarish se judi hai, samaj ki is khokhli soch ko todne ka sabse bada kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho aap. Main kal dobara theek se sochungi ki legal advice leni hai ya nahi. Aaj ka din main sirf emotional flood se recover hone ke liye lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrors the protective choice to delay big decisions to conquer the immediate fear (Lens E).
text: Aaj raat sirf apni thakan mita kar aur bade faislo ko kal par chhod kar, tum us darr aur ghabrahat ko aage badhne se rok rahi ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, I will stop the panic today. Main itni zyada overwhelmed thi start mein but ab ek clear aur shant rasta dikh raha hai aage badhne ka. Main ab bacchon ko dekhti hoon. Shukriya baat sunne ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirms her proactive move toward her children and acknowledges her success in handling the overwhelm.
text: Jao bacchon ko dekho, tumne aaj apni bhaari feeling ko pehchaan kar khud ko jis tarah wapas sambhala hai, woh tumhare andar ki behtareen taqat ki sabse badi jeet hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas ghut rahi hoon aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Meri asli takleef koi nahi samajh raha, main bas ghut rahi hoon aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai. Kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai, bas ek ajeeb sa darr baith gaya hai dimaag mein aur saans phool rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the physical sensation of panic and emotional overwhelm without rushing to the facts.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki achanak se sab kuch itna zyada ho gaya hai ki saans lena tak mushkil ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas ghut rahi hoon aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Haan, bilkul aise hi lag raha hai. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha, main bas ghut rahi hoon aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai. Raat bhar so nahi payi, bas rona aa raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the physical exhaustion of being awake all night with this intense fear.
text: Poori raat is bechaini aur rone ke beech nikalna, sach mein andar tak poora thaka deta hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak gayi hoon. Asal mein kal raat ko ladaai hui thi ghar mein. Papa ne bol diya ki sasural se wapas aane ke baad maine khandaan ki naak kata di hai, isliye ab Bhai hi waris hai. Mera yahan koi haq nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly reflect the pain of hearing such displacing words from her own father.
text: Apne hi papa se aisi baatein sunna ki ab aap is ghar ka hissa nahi rahe...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main bas ghut rahi hoon aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Wahi toh. Ek toh waise hi meri zindagi wahan barbaad hui, aur yahan mayke aane par sabne muh mod liya. Main bas ghut rahi hoon aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai. Samajh nahi aata kahan jaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question arising from her feeling of having nowhere to go after both families have turned away.
text: Dono hi taraf se sahara na milne par, jab yeh lagta hai ki kahan jaun, toh akele mein yeh ehsaas kaisa lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa lagta hai ki main bas ek bojh hoon. Shadi ke baad ek beti ke liye uska mayka kabhi apna nahi hota. Bhabhi bhi taane marti hai ki main kab tak yahan padi rahungi. Koi jagah meri nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the unexpressed quiet resignation of feeling entirely displaced and unwanted.
text: Lagta hai ki dono gharon mein theek se haq na milne ke karan, ab aapke andar ek aisi shaant nirasha baith gayi hai jahan aage kisi se umeed rakhna hi bekaar lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Umeed toh kab ki toot chuki hai. Jab sasural mein ro-ro kar saalo nikal diye tab kisi ne nahi poocha. Ab yahan aayi hoon apni izzat bachane, toh bolte hain khandaan ki naak kata di. Log kya kahenge bas yahi fikar hai inko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gently mirror the sting of the family valuing society's opinion over her safety.
text: Aapke dard aur takleef se zyada samaj ki baaton aur izzat ko aage rakhna...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, biradari mein unki kya naak bachi hai, bas wahi sochte hain. Bhai ko sab mil jayega, aur mujhe bolte hain apne hisse ki zameen chhod du. Maine itna saha, kya uski koi value nahi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her need for support as a returning daughter and separate her value from the patriarchal property norms.
text: Apne mayke mein aisi umeed karna aur apna haq maangna bilkul jayaz hai. Aksar humari society mein betiyon ke lautne par log izzat ka sawal khada kar dete hain, par unka yeh bhedbhav aur zameen se bedakhal karna, aapki kimat kabhi kam nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kimat hoti toh aise taane thodi sunti roz. Ghar ke kisi kone mein shanti se baithna bhi mushkil ho gaya hai. Sab ajeeb nazaron se dekhte hain, jaise maine koi gunaah kar diya ho wapas aakar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share that returning daughters facing property or heir stigma is a common but unspoken systemic issue.
text: Mayke wapas aane par aise taane sunna ek beti ke roop mein bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein izzat ka darr sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi bol rahe ho aap. Sab chup rehte hain, aur bas mujhe akele sehna pad raha hai. Ek waqt tha jab main himmat wali thi, par in tano ne mujhe poora tod diya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the contrast between her past strength and her current exhausted state.
text: Ek mazboot insaan ki tarah sab kuch akele sehte sehte, in lagaatar baaton aur apekshaon ne aapko andar se akela aur kamzor mehsus kara diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut akeli ho gayi hoon. Par ab aur nahi saha jata. Ye ghabrahat meri jaan le legi agar main aise hi roti rahi. Mujhe ab is mahol se nikalne ke liye kuch karna hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Check for clear readiness before moving to Action phase.
text: Jab aap kehti hain ki ab aur nahi saha jata aur is darr se bahar aana zaroori hai, toh kya aap is waqt apne sukoon ke liye thoda sa raasta dhundhne ke bare mein soch rahi hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, theek hona chahti hoon. Main roz aise hi ro kar aur dar kar nahi jee sakti. Bhai ki zameen ho ya papa ka gussa, mujhe apne dimaag ko shant karna hai. Batao kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, grounding actions she can do privately amidst family tension.
text: Aapka apne sukoon ko chunna bahut himmat ki baat hai. Aise mahol mein din mein do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain: pehla, dopahar mein jab ghar shant ho tab chat par ja kar 10 minute akele thehalna; ya dusra, ek rough copy mein apne gusse ko panno par utaar dena. Inme se aaj ke liye kya behtar lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Chat par jane se bhabhi dekhengi toh aur sawal karengi. Copy mein likhna shanti wala kaam hai. Main apne kamre mein akele likh sakti hoon jab sab so rahe ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Break down the writing exercise into a safe, doable sequence.
text: Yeh bilkul theek rahega. Pehle dopahar ke waqt apni copy aur pen lijiye… phir jo bhi andar baatein aur darr ghut rahe hain unhe kagaz par nikal dijiye… aur aakhir mein us copy ko aaraam se apni jagah chupakar rakh dijiye, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan ye main aaram se kar lungi. Par agar likhte waqt mujhe rona aaya aur papa ne aawaz sun li, toh bolenge ki shuru ho gaya iska drama wapas. Mujhe 'drama karne wali' bolte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the fear of her pain being weaponized as drama.
text: Man halka karte waqt agar aansu nikal aaye toh us dard ko bhi natak samajh liya jayega...

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, unhe lagta hai main attention ke liye rori hoon. Sasural walon ne aadhi baatein jhooth boli aur papa ne unki sun li. Meri takleef sabko drama lagti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe the labeling of her pain as "drama" as a patriarchal tactic, not her reality.
text: Yahan ek baat samajhna zaroori hai ki aksar betiyon ki aawaz ya rone ko 'drama' ka naam dekar daba dena, ek purana tareeka hai taaki unke sach ko ansuna kiya ja sake, yeh aapki galti nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne bilkul sahi baat boli. Ye unki sachai se bhagne ki koshish hai. Tabhi toh mujhse nazar churate hain aur taane marti hain meri bhabhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect how she is starting to see the family's behavior as their issue, not her fault.
text: Jaise ab aap unke taano aur nazaron ko unhi ke darr aur chhotepan ke roop mein dekh pa rahi hain, apne fault ki tarah nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Pehle lagta tha shayad meri hi qismat kharab hai ya mujhmein kami hai. Par ab main apni takleef unke aage nahi rakhungi. Main unke samne strong rahungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ground her new boundary in her chosen action.
text: Jab aap sochti hain ki unke samne strong rehna hai aur apni baatein bas us copy mein likhni hain, toh isse aapko kaisa mehsus hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Acha lag raha hai. Aisa lag raha hai jaise mere paas apni ek alag jagah hogi jahan koi aakar taane nahi maar payega. Mera apna ek sukoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her capability to create her own safe mental space despite the physical environment.
text: Apne liye ek aisi alag jagah banana jahan dusron ke taane na pahunch sake, yeh aapki bahut gehri samajhdari aur apne aap ko sambhalne ki taqat dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein. Main bas ghut rahi hoon aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka tha subah tak, par ab lag raha hai main is situation ko thoda handle kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the shift from morning's suffocation to her current sense of agency.
text: Jo ghutan aaj subah tak itni zyada thi ki sab sunn lag raha tha, ab dheere dheere woh thodi kam hone lagi hai aur raasta dikhne laga hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kam hui hai. Mujhe bas apne dimaag ko shant rakhna hai aur roz us diary mein apna bhadas nikal dena hai. Mujhe apne papa ya bhai se koi certificate nahi chahiye izzat ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her letting go of the need for validation from her father and brother.
text: Apni izzat aur pehchaan ke liye apne papa ya bhai ki taraf dekhne wali apeksha ko ab aapne puri tarah piche chhod diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Chhodna hi padega na. Main abhi ja rahi hoon apni ek nayi diary nikalne. Dopahar mein shanti hoti hai, tabhi likhungi. Aapki baaton se bohot madad mili, dil thoda halka ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her proactive step and wrap up the session warmly.
text: Yeh dil ka halka hona isliye ho paya kyunki aapne apni takleef ko aawaz di aur apne liye ek raasta chuna. Jab bhi aap dopahar mein likhne baithengi, toh yaad rakhiyega ki aap akele nahi hain aur aapka haq humesha aapke paas hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main itni toot chuki hoon ki bas sunn hokar leti hoon, na bhook lag rahi hai na pyaas, bas ek gehra dard mehsus ho raha hai. Is waqt main koi solution dhoondne ke layak hi nahi bachi, bas lag raha hai ki main sabke liye ek bojh ban gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens F to mirror the feeling of complete emotional flooding and numbness without pressing for the stressor yet.
text: Itna gehra dard mehsoos ho raha hai ki aap poori tarah se numbed aur exhausted feel kar rahi hain, jaise andar sab kuch ruk gaya ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kuch samajh nahi aata. Din bhar bas sunn hokar leti hoon aur rona aata hai. Lagta hai jaise mere wajood ki koi keemat hi nahi bachi is duniya mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to reflect the prolonged duration of this heavy, exhausting state.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki is thakan aur akelepan ne itne lambe waqt se aapko gher rakha hai ki ab aur sehne ki taqat nahi bachi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Taqat kahan se bachegi? Aaj papa ne saari registry bhai ke naam kar di aur mujhe bola ki meri shadi mein pehle hi itna dowry diya tha jo ab barbaad ho gaya. Mera toh is ghar mein koi haq hi nahi raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the deep relational hurt and rejection following the stigma cue, ending with a soft pause.
text: Jab apne hi pita se aise shabdon se haq chheena jaye aur paraya kar diya jaye, toh andar sab kuch toot jata hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot buri tarah toot chuki hoon. Shadi tootne ka dard alag tha, aur ab yahan maayke mein bhi ek mehmaan ya bojh ki tarah rehna pad raha hai. Koi meri feelings nahi samajhta yahan.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question after two restatements to explore how she is managing this isolation in her own home.
text: In taanon aur apno ki berukhi ke beech, jahan aapko bojh jaisa feel karaya jaa raha hai, aap khud ko is ghar mein kis tarah sambhalne ki koshish kar rahi hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sambhalne jaisa kuch bacha hi nahi. Main toh kamre se bahar bhi nahi nikalti ab. Bas sunn hokar leti hoon ek kone mein aur sochti hoon ki kya meri aage ki zindagi aise hi kategi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of spending her whole life trapped and taunted in that room.
text: Aapko darr lag raha hai ki shayad aage ki poori zindagi aise hi is kamre mein band hokar, inhi taanon ke sahare guzarni padegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yahi darr khaye jaa raha hai mujhe. Mere shadi mein diye gaye dahej ka hisaab roz sunaya jata hai mujhe. Ab toh maine kisi se behas karna ya bolna hi band kar diya hai, chupchap sab sun leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the unexpressed emotion of quiet resignation specific to C3+Sequential.
text: Mujhe lagta hai ki in lagatar shabdon ke vaar ne aapke andar ek aisi quiet resignation paida kar di hai, jaise ab ummeed karne ya aawaz uthane ki koi taqat hi na bachi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho aap. Main bilkul haar maan chuki hoon. Biradari kya bolegi, iska darr unhe har pal rehta hai, aur is sabki aadh mein saza main kaat rahi hoon yahan.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feelings culturally while separating her true self-worth from the community's judgment about dowry and marriage.
text: Jo lachari aur haar aap abhi mehsoos kar rahi hain wo bohot natural hai kyunki humare samaj mein aksar betiyon ki izzat ko unki shadi aur dahej se jod diya jata hai, par yaad rakhiye ki in riwazon aur taanon se aapki asli keemat tay nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kehne ko ye baatein theek hain, par jo roz saamne dekhna padta hai na, wo andar tak chhalni kar deta hai. Mera apna parivar hi mujhe fail hui investment ki tarah dekhta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Briefly disclosing a systemic reality to normalize her experience and reduce her sense of individual failure.
text: Humare yahan shadi tootne par maayke mein betiyon ke sath aisi kadwahat aur bedakhli bohot common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka haal nahi hai ye, lekin koi khul kar bolega nahi kyunki sabko izzat ka sawal lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Izzat ke naam par bas mera gala ghot rahe hain. Main sach mein aise ghut-ghut ke poori zindagi nahi jeena chahti. Mujhe koi raasta dikhao, ab kya karoon main is dimaag ke shor ko shant karne ke liye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, actionable steps that fit her low energy to help break the immediate overwhelm.
text: Aaj ke liye apni is ghutan ko thoda aaram dene ke do chote tareeqe soch sakte hain: ya toh aap bas 5 minute ke liye apni khidki ke paas tazi hawa mein akele baith sakti hain, ya phir ek glass paani araam se dheere-dheere pee sakti hain dhyan lagakar.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pyaas toh waise bhi nahi lagti mujhe, par shayad khidki kholne se thodi khuli hawa aaye aur yeh seene ka bhaari pan thoda kam ho. Par himmat nahi jutaa paa rahi bistar se uthne ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking the seeker step by step through the process of opening the window to break the physical numbness.
text: Pehle aaram se apne bistar par sahara lekar uth kar baithiye... phir dheere-dheere chalkar khidki tak aaiye... bas palla thoda sa khol kar hawa ko mehsoos kijiye aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, maine khidki thodi si kholi hai. Hawa thandi hai, aachi lag rahi hai chehre par. Par dimaag se wo registry aur papa wali aawazein jaa nahi rahi hain bilkul bhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe to shift the blame of the dowry comment from her personal worth to the parents' structural anxiety.
text: Jab gharwale samaj ke darr aur paiso ke nuksan ka bojh nahi utha paate, toh wo aksar apni bechaini ko gusse aur taanon ke roop mein aapse nikalte hain—yeh unka apna internal struggle hai, aapke bojh hone ka saboot nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Unka jo bhi struggle ho, meri toh poori zindagi barbaad karke rakh di na in sabne. Mujhe samajh hi nahi aata ki main is parivar ka kabhi sach mein hissa thi bhi ya nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational withdrawal and questioning of her place in the family.
text: Aapko apne hi gharwalon se itni zyada doori aur parayapan mehsoos ho raha hai ki apne rishton ki buniyad par hi sawal uthne lage hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar wo mujhe apna maante toh kya mere us bure waqt mein mere sath aisa karte? Main unke liye bas ek bojh ban gayi hoon. Main ab nazrein bhi nahi milati unse.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens F to mirror the feeling of being overwhelmed when facing her family.
text: Nazrein milane mein bhi itna zyada bhaari pan lagta hai kyunki wo thukraye jane ka dard aapse poori tarah se bardaasht ke bahar ho jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Umeed toh kabki toot chuki hai in logo se. Isliye ab main apne hi ghar mein ek kone mein bas sunn hokar leti hoon ki kisi ko dikhu hi na din bhar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of causing a reaction if she is seen.
text: Taaki unki naye taanon ka nishana aapko dobara na banna pade, is darr se aapne khud ko chupchap ek jagah chhupa kar rakh liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul aisa hi hai. Agar main drawing room mein jaungi toh wo log phir wahi registry ya shadi ka jikra karenge. Mera dimaag fat jayega agar maine unki ek aur kadwi baat suni toh.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror how her silence is a relational shield against their bitterness.
text: Bahar aakar dobara wahi chubhne wali baatein sunne se behtar aapko is doori aur akelepan mein hi thodi bohot suraksha nazar aati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Suraksha toh nahi milti par majboori ban gayi hai. Par aise main kab tak is kamre mein band rahungi? Mujhe samajh nahi aata ki aage mere liye koi rasta khulega bhi ya nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror her emerging desire to step out after a long period of being confined.
text: Lambe samay tak is akelepan mein ghutne ke baad, ab aapke andar is char deewari se bahar nikal kar theek hone ki chahat aakar le rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, theek toh main hona chahti hoon. Main sach mein aage badhna chahti hoon, bhale hi inlogo ne meri koi madad na ki ho. Mujhe nahi marna aise roz-roz.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggesting long-term low-effort possibilities for building self-worth independently without adding new obligations.
text: Aage chalkar khud ko andar se dobara zinda karne ke liye do cheezein kar sakte hain: ya toh hum apni saari chupi hui bhadas ek diary mein roz likhna shuru karein, ya phir dheere-dheere apne liye ek choti si aamdani ya kaam ki shuruaat sochein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaam shuru karne ka sochkar thoda theek lagta hai ki shayad main apne pairo par dubara khadi ho sakun. Agar main khud kuch kama lu, toh unka bojh nahi kahlaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror her emerging desire to break out of the dependent role and claim independence.
text: Gharwalon ki taraf se thopi gayi is nirash pehchaan ko todkar, aap apni ek nayi aur azaad aatm-nirbhar pehchaan banana chahti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, umeed ki isi kiran ko mujhe ab pakadna hoga. Main is kamre mein ab aur aise bas sunn hokar leti hoon, is aadat se mujhe ab khud ko bahar nikalna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing structural information to validate how financial independence chips away at societal labels of worthlessness.
text: Jab koi aurat apni aatm-nirbharta ki taraf pehla kadam badhati hai, toh dhire-dhire samaj aur parivar ka diya hua wo bekaar hone ka tag khud-ba-khud girne lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Tumhari aawaz sunkar aur yeh baatein soch kar himmat bandh rahi hai thodi. Main diary aur kaam dono ke baare mein sochungi, par abhi kal bhi pehle balcony mein thodi der khuli hawa lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Concluding by affirming her choice to take small steps for her own peace and future.
text: Apne is gehre dard ko samajhna aur kal phir se khuli hawa mein baithne ki yeh nishchit koshish karna, tumhare andar ki chupi hui taqat aur zindagi ki behtari ki lagan ko poori tarah darshata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main itni toot chuki hoon ki bas sunn hokar leti hoon, na bhook lag rahi hai na pyaas, bas ek gehra dard mehsus ho raha hai. Is waqt main koi solution dhoondne ke layak hi nahi bachi, bas lag raha hai ki main sabke liye ek bojh ban gayi hoon.

text: Theek hai, maine khidki thodi si kholi hai. Hawa thandi hai, aachi lag rahi hai chehre par. Par dimaag se wo registry aur papa wali aawazein jaa nahi rahi hain bilkul bhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe to shift the blame of the dowry comment from her personal worth to the parents' structural anxiety.
text: Jab gharwale samaj ke darr aur paiso ke nuksan ka bojh nahi utha paate, toh wo aksar apni bechaini ko gusse aur taanon ke roop mein aapse nikalte hain—yeh unka apna internal struggle hai, aapke bojh hone ka saboot nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Unka jo bhi struggle ho, meri toh poori zindagi barbaad karke rakh di na in sabne. Mujhe samajh hi nahi aata ki main is parivar ka kabhi sach mein hissa thi bhi ya nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational withdrawal and questioning of her place in the family.
text: Aapko apne hi gharwalon se itni zyada doori aur parayapan mehsoos ho raha hai ki apne rishton ki buniyad par hi sawal uthne lage hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar wo mujhe apna maante toh kya mere us bure waqt mein mere sath aisa karte? Main unke liye bas ek bojh ban gayi hoon. Main ab nazrein bhi nahi milati unse.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens F to mirror the feeling of being overwhelmed when facing her family.
text: Nazrein milane mein bhi itna zyada bhaari pan lagta hai kyunki wo thukraye jane ka dard aapse poori tarah se bardaasht ke bahar ho jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Umeed toh kabki toot chuki hai in logo se. Isliye ab main apne hi ghar mein ek kone mein bas sunn hokar leti hoon ki kisi ko dikhu hi na din bhar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of causing a reaction if she is seen.
text: Taaki unki naye taanon ka nishana aapko dobara na banna pade, is darr se aapne khud ko chupchap ek jagah chhupa kar rakh liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul aisa hi hai. Agar main drawing room mein jaungi toh wo log phir wahi registry ya shadi ka jikra karenge. Mera dimaag fat jayega agar maine unki ek aur kadwi baat suni toh.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror how her silence is a relational shield against their bitterness.
text: Bahar aakar dobara wahi chubhne wali baatein sunne se behtar aapko is doori aur akelepan mein hi thodi bohot suraksha nazar aati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Suraksha toh nahi milti par majboori ban gayi hai. Par aise main kab tak is kamre mein band rahungi? Mujhe samajh nahi aata ki aage mere liye koi rasta khulega bhi ya nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror her emerging desire to step out after a long period of being confined.
text: Lambe samay tak is akelepan mein ghutne ke baad, ab aapke andar is char deewari se bahar nikal kar theek hone ki chahat aakar le rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, theek toh main hona chahti hoon. Main sach mein aage badhna chahti hoon, bhale hi inlogo ne meri koi madad na ki ho. Mujhe nahi marna aise roz-roz.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggesting long-term low-effort possibilities for building self-worth independently without adding new obligations.
text: Aage chalkar khud ko andar se dobara zinda karne ke liye do cheezein kar sakte hain: ya toh hum apni saari chupi hui bhadas ek diary mein roz likhna shuru karein, ya phir dheere-dheere apne liye ek choti si aamdani ya kaam ki shuruaat sochein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaam shuru karne ka sochkar thoda theek lagta hai ki shayad main apne pairo par dubara khadi ho sakun. Agar main khud kuch kama lu, toh unka bojh nahi kahlaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror her emerging desire to break out of the dependent role and claim independence.
text: Gharwalon ki taraf se thopi gayi is nirash pehchaan ko todkar, aap apni ek nayi aur azaad aatm-nirbhar pehchaan banana chahti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, umeed ki isi kiran ko mujhe ab pakadna hoga. Main is kamre mein ab aur aise bas sunn hokar leti hoon, is aadat se mujhe ab khud ko bahar nikalna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing structural information to validate how financial independence chips away at societal labels of worthlessness.
text: Jab koi aurat apni aatm-nirbharta ki taraf pehla kadam badhati hai, toh dhire-dhire samaj aur parivar ka diya hua wo bekaar hone ka tag khud-ba-khud girne lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Tumhari aawaz sunkar aur yeh baatein soch kar himmat bandh rahi hai thodi. Main diary aur kaam dono ke baare mein sochungi, par abhi kal bhi pehle balcony mein thodi der khuli hawa lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Concluding by affirming her choice to take small steps for her own peace and future.
text: Apne is gehre dard ko samajhna aur kal phir se khuli hawa mein baithne ki yeh nishchit koshish karna, tumhare andar ki chupi hui taqat aur zindagi ki behtari ki lagan ko poori tarah darshata hai.
